name: Genesee Park Golf Club
address: 25948 Genesee Trail Rd Unit L, Golden, CO 80401
about: Genesee Park Golf Club is an indoor golf simulator venue that offers a premium golfing experience. They feature Golfzon technology, which utilizes high-definition 3D graphics and a moving swing plate to simulate play on over 190 world-famous golf courses. The facility provides a comfortable indoor environment for golfers to practice and play, with options for both hourly bookings and membership plans. The venue also offers food from the on-site Genesee Pub & BBQ, creating a social and complete experience beyond just golf.
why_golfers_like_it: Access to over 190 world-famous golf courses via Golfzon technology
High-accuracy moving swing plate with variable ground settings
On-site food and craft beer from Genesee Pub & BBQ
Multiple simulator bay options for 1-4 players

food_and_drink.notes: Food available from Genesee Pub & BBQ

simulator_hardware.notes: Moving swing plate with variable ground settings

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: Players are expected to bring their own golf clubs to use with the simulators.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: No, the venue offers food and craft beer from the on-site Genesee Pub & BBQ.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: The time for 18 holes can vary depending on the pace of play and the simulator software, but typically it takes around 2-3 hours for a full round.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, the venue is considered kid-friendly, with a casual atmosphere and food options available.
